name: twenty
description: Build Twenty apps, add app features, design front components, search docs, configure workspace MCP, prepare app listings, and retrieve workspace data in readable form.

interface.shortDescription: Build apps, features, and front components
interface.longDescription: Use Twenty to scaffold Twenty apps with create-twenty-app, add app entities such as objects, fields, logic functions, views, layouts, skills, and agents, design polished front components, search official Twenty documentation through the bundled docs MCP server, configure workspace-specific Twenty MCP servers with OAuth, retrieve workspace data as readable Markdown, and prepare README, marketplace metadata, logos, and screenshots for Twenty apps.
defaultPrompt: Create and run a new Twenty app
Add features to an existing Twenty app
Design a polished Twenty front component
Find the current Twenty docs for app development
Connect Codex to my Twenty workspace
Show my latest Twenty records as a readable table
